mnemonics.title: CAP Priorities
mnemonics.content: CAke Pops (CA: traditional), APple Pie (AP: NoSQL), CP Cookies (CP: financial)

visualTips.visualization: Imagine two server clusters separated by firewall with crossed-out connection lines
Multiple water droplets merging into single pool over time

analogies.analogy: Bank ATM network - all machines show exact balance immediately
Wikipedia edits - changes become visible to all users after some delay
